notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Adrian Del Castillo out at 1st.
